controls.control_objective: To ensure supersede the earlier directions on the subject, namely, the master direction - monitoring of frauds in nbfcs (reserve bank) directions, 2016 dated se
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall
supersede the earlier Directions on the subject, namely, the Master Direction -
Monitoring of Frauds in NBFCs (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2016 dated September 29,
2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to supersede the earlier directions on the subject, namely, the master direction - monitoring of frauds in nbfcs (reserve bank) directions, 2016 dated se

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (fraud risk management in nbfcs) directions, 2024
controls.control_description:
1.1 Short Title and Commencement
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Fraud Risk Management
in NBFCs) Directions, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (fraud risk management in nbfcs) directions, 2024

controls.control_objective: To ensure hereinafter collectively be referred to as 'applicable nbfcs' for the purpose of these directions
controls.control_description:
1.2.2 These NBFCs shall hereinafter collectively be referred to as 'Applicable
NBFCs' for the purpose of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hereinafter collectively be referred to as 'applicable nbfcs' for the purpose of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the incidents of fraud to nhb as hitherto
controls.control_description: 4 HFCs shall report the incidents of fraud to NHB as hitherto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the incidents of fraud to nhb as hitherto

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a board5 approved policy6 on fraud risk management delineating roles and responsibilities of board / board committees and senior management of the
controls.control_description:
2.1 There shall be a Board5 approved Policy6 on fraud risk management delineating
roles and responsibilities of Board / Board Committees and Senior Management of the
Applicable NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a board5 approved policy6 on fraud risk management delineating roles and responsibilities of board / board committees and senior management of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure also incorporate measures for ensuring compliance with principles of natural justice7 in a time-bound manner which at a minimum shall include:
controls.control_description:
The Policy shall also incorporate measures for ensuring compliance
with principles of natural justice7 in a time-bound manner which at a minimum shall
include:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also incorporate measures for ensuring compliance with principles of natural justice7 in a time-bound manner which at a minimum shall include:

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide complete details of transactions / actions / events basis which declaration and reporting of a fraud is being contemplated under these directi
controls.control_description:
The SCN shall provide complete details
of transactions / actions / events basis which declaration and reporting of a
fraud is being contemplated under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide complete details of transactions / actions / events basis which declaration and reporting of a fraud is being contemplated under these directi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the persons / entities on whom the scn was served to respond to the said scn
controls.control_description:
2.1.2 A reasonable time of not less than 21 days shall be provided to the
Persons / Entities on whom the SCN was served to respond to the said SCN.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the persons / entities on whom the scn was served to respond to the said scn

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a well laid out system for issuance of scn and examination of the responses / submissions made by the persons/entities prior to declaring such pe
controls.control_description:
2.1.3 Applicable NBFCs shall have a well laid out system for issuance of SCN
and examination of the responses / submissions made by the Persons/Entities
prior to declaring such Persons / Entities as fraudulent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a well laid out system for issuance of scn and examination of the responses / submissions made by the persons/entities prior to declaring such pe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be served on the persons / entities conveying the decision of the applicable nbfcs regarding declaration / classification of the account as fraud or o
controls.control_description:
2.1.4 A reasoned Order shall be served on the Persons / Entities conveying
the decision of the Applicable NBFCs regarding declaration / classification of
the account as fraud or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be served on the persons / entities conveying the decision of the applicable nbfcs regarding declaration / classification of the account as fraud or o

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain relevant facts / circumstances relied upon, submission made against the scn and the reasons for classification as fraud or otherwise
controls.control_description:
Such Order(s) must contain relevant facts
/ circumstances relied upon, submission made against the SCN and the
reasons for classification as fraud or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain relevant facts / circumstances relied upon, submission made against the scn and the reasons for classification as fraud or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter alia contain measures towards prevention, early detection, investigation, staff accountability, monitoring, recovery and reporting of frauds
controls.control_description: 6 The policy shall inter alia contain measures towards prevention, early detection, investigation, staff accountability, monitoring, recovery and reporting of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter alia contain measures towards prevention, early detection, investigation, staff accountability, monitoring, recovery and reporting of frauds

controls.control_objective: To ensure 12, 2023 passed by the hon'ble supreme court in misc
controls.control_description: and connected matters, read with the Order dated May 12, 2023 passed by the Hon'ble Supreme Court in Misc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 12, 2023 passed by the hon'ble supreme court in misc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to
controls.control_description: 12000 of 2021 and connected matters shall be referred to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to

controls.control_objective: To ensure take this into consideration before proceeding against such directors under these directions
controls.control_description: 9 As non-whole-time directors (like nominee directors and independent directors) are normally not in charge of, or responsible to the company for the conduct of business of the company, Applicable NBFCs may take this into consideration before proceeding against such directors under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take this into consideration before proceeding against such directors under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed by the board at least once in three years, or more frequently, as may be prescribed by the board
controls.control_description:
2.2 The Fraud Risk Management Policy shall be reviewed by the Board at least once
in three years, or more frequently, as may be prescribed by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed by the board at least once in three years, or more frequently, as may be prescribed by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a committee of the board to be known as 'special committee of the board for monitoring and follow-up of cases of frauds' (scbmf) with a min
controls.control_description:
2.3 Special Committee of the Board for Monitoring and Follow-up of cases of
Frauds: Applicable NBFCs shall constitute a Committee of the Board to be known as
'Special Committee of the Board for Monitoring and Follow-up of cases of Frauds'
(SCBMF) with a minimum of three members of the Board, consisting of the Chief
Executive Officer10 and two Independent Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a committee of the board to be known as 'special committee of the board for monitoring and follow-up of cases of frauds' (scbmf) with a min

controls.control_objective: To ensure be headed by one of the independent directors
controls.control_description:
The Committee shall be headed
by one of the Independent Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be headed by one of the independent directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option of constituting a committee of the executives (coe) with a minimum of three members, at least one of whom shall be a whole-time direct
controls.control_description:
Applicable NBFCs categorised as Middle Layer
and Base Layer for regulatory purposes11, shall have the option of constituting a
Committee of the Executives (CoE) with a minimum of three members, at least one of
whom shall be a Whole-time director or equivalent rank Official for the purpose of
performing the roles and responsibilities of SCBMF as required under these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option of constituting a committee of the executives (coe) with a minimum of three members, at least one of whom shall be a whole-time direct

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee the effectiveness of the fraud risk management in the applicable nbfc
controls.control_description:
2.3.1 SCBMF shall oversee the effectiveness of the fraud risk management in
the Applicable NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to oversee the effectiveness of the fraud risk management in the applicable nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and monitor cases of frauds, including root cause analysis, and suggest mitigating measures for strengthening the internal controls, risk manag
controls.control_description:
2.3.2 SCBMF shall review and monitor cases of frauds, including root cause
analysis, and suggest mitigating measures for strengthening the internal
controls, risk management framework and minimising the incidence of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and monitor cases of frauds, including root cause analysis, and suggest mitigating measures for strengthening the internal controls, risk manag

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by the board of the applicable nbfc
controls.control_description:
The coverage12 and periodicity of such reviews shall be decided by the Board
of the Applicable NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided by the board of the applicable nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for implementation of the fraud risk management policy approved by the board of the applicable nbfc
controls.control_description:
2.4 The Senior Management shall be responsible for implementation of the fraud risk
management policy approved by the Board of the Applicable NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for implementation of the fraud risk management policy approved by the board of the applicable nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be placed before board / audit committee of board (acb), as appropriate, by the senior management of the applicable nbfc
controls.control_description:
A periodic
review of incidents of fraud shall also be placed before Board / Audit Committee of
Board (ACB), as appropriate, by the Senior Management of the Applicable NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be placed before board / audit committee of board (acb), as appropriate, by the senior management of the applicable nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a transparent mechanism to ensure that whistle blower complaints on possible fraud cases / suspicious activities in 10 managing director
controls.control_description:
2.5 Applicable NBFCs shall put in place a transparent mechanism to ensure that
Whistle Blower complaints on possible fraud cases / suspicious activities in
10 Managing Director where the Chief Executive Officer is not a whole-time director.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a transparent mechanism to ensure that whistle blower complaints on possible fraud cases / suspicious activities in 10 managing director

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, among others, categories/trends of frauds, industry/sectoral/ geographical concentration of frauds, delay in detection/classification of frau
controls.control_description: 12 The coverage may include, among others, categories/trends of frauds, industry/sectoral/ geographical concentration of frauds, delay in detection/classification of frauds and delay in examination/conclusion of staff accountability, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, among others, categories/trends of frauds, industry/sectoral/ geographical concentration of frauds, delay in detection/classification of frau

controls.control_objective: To ensure set-up an appropriate organisational structure for institutionalisation of fraud risk management13 within their overall risk management functions / de
controls.control_description:
2.6 Applicable NBFCs shall set-up an appropriate organisational structure for
institutionalisation of fraud risk management13 within their overall risk management
functions / Department.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set-up an appropriate organisational structure for institutionalisation of fraud risk management13 within their overall risk management functions / de

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for monitoring and reporting of frauds
controls.control_description:
A sufficiently senior official shall be responsible for
monitoring and reporting of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for monitoring and reporting of frauds

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose the amount related to fraud reported in the company for the year in their financial statements - notes to accounts
controls.control_description:
2.7 Applicable NBFCs shall disclose the amount related to fraud reported in the
company for the year in their Financial Statements - Notes to Accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose the amount related to fraud reported in the company for the year in their financial statements - notes to accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a framework for early warning signals (ews) under the overall fraud risk management policy approved by the board
controls.control_description:
3.1.1 NBFCs in the Upper Layer and Middle Layer (NBFCs - UL & ML) shall
have a framework for Early Warning Signals (EWS) under the overall Fraud
Risk Management Policy approved by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a framework for early warning signals (ews) under the overall fraud risk management policy approved by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee the effectiveness of the framework for ews
controls.control_description:
3.1.2 A Board Level Committee15 shall oversee the effectiveness of the
framework for EWS.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to oversee the effectiveness of the framework for ews

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for implementation of a robust framework for ews within the nbfcs - ul & ml
controls.control_description:
The Senior Management shall be responsible for
implementation of a robust Framework for EWS within the NBFCs - UL & ML.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for implementation of a robust framework for ews within the nbfcs - ul & ml

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify appropriate early warning indicators for monitoring credit facilities / loan accounts and other financial transactions
controls.control_description:
3.1.3 NBFCs - UL & ML shall identify appropriate early warning indicators for
monitoring credit facilities / loan accounts and other financial transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify appropriate early warning indicators for monitoring credit facilities / loan accounts and other financial transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed periodically for their effectiveness
controls.control_description: These indicators shall be reviewed periodically for their effectiveness.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed periodically for their effectiveness

controls.control_objective: To ensure alert / trigger deeper investigation from potential fraud angle and initiating preventive measures
controls.control_description:
Suspicion of fraudulent activity thrown up by the presence of one or more EWS
indicators shall alert / trigger deeper investigation from potential fraud angle and
initiating preventive measures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to alert / trigger deeper investigation from potential fraud angle and initiating preventive measures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to suitable validation in accordance with the directions of the board level committee so as to ensure its integrity, robustness and consist
controls.control_description:
3.1.4 The EWS framework shall be subject to suitable validation in accordance
with the directions of the Board Level Committee so as to ensure its integrity,
robustness and consistency of the outcomes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to suitable validation in accordance with the directions of the board level committee so as to ensure its integrity, robustness and consist

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for, among others:
controls.control_description: 3.2 The EWS Framework shall provide for, among others:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide for, among others:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfcs in the upper layer and middle layer only
controls.control_description: 14 The Directions prescribed under Chapter III shall be applicable to NBFCs in the Upper Layer and Middle Layer only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfcs in the upper layer and middle layer only

controls.control_objective: To ensure be comprehensive and designed to include both the quantitative and qualitative indicators to make the framework robust and effective
controls.control_description:
3.3.1 The EWS system shall be comprehensive and designed to include both
the quantitative and qualitative indicators to make the framework robust and
effective.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be comprehensive and designed to include both the quantitative and qualitative indicators to make the framework robust and effective

controls.control_objective: To ensure illustratively capture could be based on the transactional data of accounts, financial performance of borrowers, market intelligence, conduct of the b
controls.control_description:
The broad indicators which the EWS system may illustratively capture
could be based on the transactional data of accounts, financial performance of
borrowers, market intelligence, conduct of the borrowers, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to illustratively capture could be based on the transactional data of accounts, financial performance of borrowers, market intelligence, conduct of the b

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessitate examination whether the account needs to be investigated from potential fraud angle
controls.control_description:
3.3.2 Generation of EWS alert(s) / trigger(s) shall necessitate examination
whether the account needs to be investigated from potential fraud angle.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessitate examination whether the account needs to be investigated from potential fraud angle

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop / strengthen their ews system by identifying suitable indicators and parameterising them in their ews system for monitoring other financial /
controls.control_description:
3.4.1 NBFCs - UL & ML shall develop / strengthen their EWS system by
identifying suitable indicators and parameterising them in their EWS system for
monitoring other financial / non-credit related transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop / strengthen their ews system by identifying suitable indicators and parameterising them in their ews system for monitoring other financial /

controls.control_objective: To ensure strive to continuously upgrade the ews system for enhancing its integrity and robustness, monitor other financial / non-credit related transactions ef
controls.control_description:
NBFCs - UL & ML
shall strive to continuously upgrade the EWS system for enhancing its integrity
and robustness, monitor other financial / non-credit related transactions
efficiently and prevent fraudulent activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strive to continuously upgrade the ews system for enhancing its integrity and robustness, monitor other financial / non-credit related transactions ef

controls.control_objective: To ensure be tested periodically
controls.control_description:
Further, the effectiveness of EWS
system shall be tested periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be tested periodically

controls.control_objective: To ensure be robust and resilient to ensure that integrity of the system is maintained, personal and financial data of customers are secure and transaction moni
controls.control_description:
3.4.2 The design and specification of EWS system shall be robust and resilient
to ensure that integrity of the system is maintained, personal and financial data
of customers are secure and transaction monitoring for prevention / detection
of potential fraud is on real-time basis17.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be robust and resilient to ensure that integrity of the system is maintained, personal and financial data of customers are secure and transaction moni

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain vigilant in monitoring transactions / unusual activities, specifically in the non-kyc compliant and money mule accounts etc
controls.control_description:
NBFCs - UL & ML shall remain vigilant
in monitoring transactions / unusual activities, specifically in the non-KYC
compliant and money mule accounts etc., so as to contain unauthorised /
fraudulent transactions and to prevent misuse of banking / financial channel.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain vigilant in monitoring transactions / unusual activities, specifically in the non-kyc compliant and money mule accounts etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure extensively monitor and analyse financial transactions, including transactions carried out through digital platforms / applications, in order to ident
controls.control_description:
3.4.3 The dedicated MIS Unit or other Analytics Setup in NBFCs - UL & ML
shall extensively monitor and analyse financial transactions, including
transactions carried out through digital platforms / applications, in order to
identify unusual patterns and activities which could alert the NBFCs - UL & ML
16 i.e., other than those transactions covered under Para 3.3.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extensively monitor and analyse financial transactions, including transactions carried out through digital platforms / applications, in order to ident

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place / suitably upgrade their existing ews system within six months from the date of issuance of these directions
controls.control_description:
3.5 NBFCs - UL & ML shall put in place / suitably upgrade their existing EWS system
within six months from the date of issuance of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place / suitably upgrade their existing ews system within six months from the date of issuance of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor activities in credit facility / loan account / other financial transactions and remain alert on activities which could potentially turn out to
controls.control_description:
Credit facility / Loan account / Other financial transactions - indication of fraudulent activities
Applicable NBFCs shall monitor activities in credit facility / loan account / other
financial transactions and remain alert on activities which could potentially turn out to
be fraudulent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor activities in credit facility / loan account / other financial transactions and remain alert on activities which could potentially turn out to

controls.control_objective: To ensure use an external audit18 or an internal audit as per their board approved policy for further investigation in such accounts
controls.control_description:
4.1 In case where there is a suspicion / indication of wrongdoing or fraudulent activity,
Applicable NBFCs shall use an external audit18 or an internal audit as per their Board
approved Policy for further investigation in such accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to use an external audit18 or an internal audit as per their board approved policy for further investigation in such accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a policy on engagement of external auditors covering aspects such as due diligence, competency and track record of the auditors, among others
controls.control_description:
4.1.1 Applicable NBFCs shall frame a policy on engagement of external
auditors covering aspects such as due diligence, competency and track record
of the auditors, among others.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a policy on engagement of external auditors covering aspects such as due diligence, competency and track record of the auditors, among others

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, contain suitable clauses on timeline for completion of the audit and submission of audit report to the applicable nbfc within a specifie
controls.control_description:
Further, the contractual agreement with the
auditors shall, inter alia, contain suitable clauses on timeline for completion of
the audit and submission of audit report to the Applicable NBFC within a
specified time limit, as approved by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to , inter alia, contain suitable clauses on timeline for completion of the audit and submission of audit report to the applicable nbfc within a specifie

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain clauses for conduct of such audit at the behest of lender(s)
controls.control_description:
4.1.2 The loan agreement with the borrower shall contain clauses for conduct
of such audit at the behest of lender(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain clauses for conduct of such audit at the behest of lender(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure conclude on status of the account as a fraud or otherwise based on the material available on their record and their own internal investigation / asses
controls.control_description:
In cases where the audit report
submitted remains inconclusive or is delayed due to non-cooperation by the
borrower, Applicable NBFCs shall conclude on status of the account as a fraud
or otherwise based on the material available on their record and their own
internal investigation / assessment in such cases19.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conclude on status of the account as a fraud or otherwise based on the material available on their record and their own internal investigation / asses

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that principles of natural justice are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud (please refer to para 2
controls.control_description: 19 Applicable NBFCs shall ensure that principles of natural justice are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud (Please refer to Para 2.1 ibid).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that principles of natural justice are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud (please refer to para 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the principles of natural justice20 are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud
controls.control_description:
4.1.3 Applicable NBFCs (sole lending, multiple banking arrangement or
consortium lending) shall ensure that the principles of natural justice20 are
strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the principles of natural justice20 are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subjected to examination by applicable nbfcs concerned from fraud angle under these directions
controls.control_description:
4.1.4 In case an account is identified as a fraud by any Applicable NBFC, the
borrowal accounts of other group companies, in which one or more promoter(s)
/ whole-time director(s) are common, shall also be subjected to examination by
Applicable NBFCs concerned from fraud angle under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subjected to examination by applicable nbfcs concerned from fraud angle under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the process of classification of account as fraud as per their board approved policy and in tune with the process as given under para 2
controls.control_description:
4.1.5 In cases where Law Enforcement Agencies (LEAs) have suo moto
initiated investigation involving a borrower account, Applicable NBFCs shall
follow the process of classification of account as fraud as per their Board
approved Policy and in tune with the process as given under Para 2.1 ibid.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow the process of classification of account as fraud as per their board approved policy and in tune with the process as given under para 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate necessary terms and conditions in their agreements with third-party service providers to hold them accountable in situations where wilful
controls.control_description:
Therefore, Applicable NBFCs
may incorporate necessary terms and conditions in their agreements with third-party
service providers to hold them accountable in situations where wilful negligence /
malpractice by them is found to be a causative factor for fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate necessary terms and conditions in their agreements with third-party service providers to hold them accountable in situations where wilful

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate and complete the examination of staff accountability in all fraud cases in a time-bound manner in accordance with their internal policy
controls.control_description:
4.3.1 Applicable NBFCs shall initiate and complete the examination of staff
accountability in all fraud cases in a time-bound manner in accordance with
their internal policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to initiate and complete the examination of staff accountability in all fraud cases in a time-bound manner in accordance with their internal policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct examination of staff accountability as per the guidelines issued by the central vigilance commission (cvc)
controls.control_description:
Government-NBFCs21 shall conduct examination of staff accountability
as per the guidelines issued by the Central Vigilance Commission (CVC).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to conduct examination of staff accountability as per the guidelines issued by the central vigilance commission (cvc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure also refer all fraud cases of amount involving ₹3 crore and above for examining the role of 20 please refer to the judgement of the hon'ble supreme co
controls.control_description:
In
terms of CVC Order, Applicable NBFCs in the public sector shall also refer all
fraud cases of amount involving ₹3 crore and above for examining the role of
20 Please refer to the judgement of the Hon'ble Supreme Court dated March 27, 2023 on Civil Appeal No.7300 of 2022 in the matter of State Bank of India & Ors Vs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also refer all fraud cases of amount involving ₹3 crore and above for examining the role of 20 please refer to the judgement of the hon'ble supreme co

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to (please refer to para 2
controls.control_description: 12000 of 2021 and connected matters shall be referred to (Please refer to Para 2.1 ibid).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to (please refer to para 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate examination of their accountability and place it before the board
controls.control_description:
4.3.3 In cases involving very senior executives of the Applicable NBFCs (MD &
CEO / Executive Director / Executives of equivalent rank)23, the ACB shall
initiate examination of their accountability and place it before the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate examination of their accountability and place it before the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be referred to the abbff
controls.control_description:
However, in case of Applicable NBFCs in the public sector, such cases shall
also be referred to the ABBFF.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be referred to the abbff

controls.control_objective: To ensure be debarred from raising of funds and / or seeking additional credit facilities from financial entities regulated by rbi, for a period of five years f
controls.control_description:
4.4.1 Persons / Entities classified and reported as fraud by Applicable NBFCs
and also Entities and Persons associated24 with such Entities, shall be debarred
from raising of funds and / or seeking additional credit facilities from financial
entities regulated by RBI, for a period of five years from the date of full
repayment of the defrauded amount / settlement amount agreed upon in case
of a compromise settlement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be debarred from raising of funds and / or seeking additional credit facilities from financial entities regulated by rbi, for a period of five years f

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the sole discretion to entertain or decline such requests for credit facilities after the expiry of the above mandatory cooling period as mention
controls.control_description:
4.4.2 Lending to such Persons / Entities being commercial decisions, the
lending Applicable NBFCs shall have the sole discretion to entertain or decline
such requests for credit facilities after the expiry of the above mandatory cooling
period as mentioned at Para 4.4.1 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the sole discretion to entertain or decline such requests for credit facilities after the expiry of the above mandatory cooling period as mention

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine whether the entity shall continue to remain classified as fraud or the classification as fraud could be removed after 22 please refer to the v
controls.control_description:
4.5.1 In case an entity classified as fraud has subsequently undergone a
resolution either under IBC or under the resolution framework of RBI25 resulting
in a change in the management and control of the entity / business enterprise,
the Applicable NBFC shall examine whether the entity shall continue to remain
classified as fraud or the classification as fraud could be removed after
22 Please refer to the Vigilance Manual issued by Central Vigilance Commission (CVC), CVC Office Order No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine whether the entity shall continue to remain classified as fraud or the classification as fraud could be removed after 22 please refer to the v

controls.control_objective: To ensure participate in the meeting of the board / acb / scbmf in which their accountability is to be considered
controls.control_description: 23 Such executive shall not participate in the meeting of the Board / ACB / SCBMF in which their accountability is to be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to participate in the meeting of the board / acb / scbmf in which their accountability is to be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be associated
controls.control_description: (b) in case of a natural person, all entities in which she / he is associated as promoter, or director, or as one in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity shall be deemed to be associated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be associated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan under ibc or aforesaid prudential framework
controls.control_description:
4.5.2 The penal measures as detailed in Para 4.4 shall not be applicable to
entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan under
IBC or aforesaid prudential framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be applicable to entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan under ibc or aforesaid prudential framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to apply to the erstwhile promoter(s)/ director(s)/ persons who were in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs of the entit
controls.control_description:
4.5.3 The penal measures detailed in Para 4.4 shall continue to apply to the
erstwhile promoter(s)/ director(s)/ persons who were in charge and responsible
for the management of the affairs of the entity / business enterprise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to apply to the erstwhile promoter(s)/ director(s)/ persons who were in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs of the entit

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately report the incidents of fraud to appropriate leas, viz
controls.control_description:
5.1 Applicable NBFCs shall immediately report the incidents of fraud to appropriate
LEAs, viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately report the incidents of fraud to appropriate leas, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish suitable nodal point(s) / designate officer(s) for reporting incidents of fraud to leas and for proper coordination to meet the requirements
controls.control_description:
5.2 Applicable NBFCs shall establish suitable nodal point(s) / designate officer(s) for
reporting incidents of fraud to LEAs and for proper coordination to meet the
requirements of the LEAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish suitable nodal point(s) / designate officer(s) for reporting incidents of fraud to leas and for proper coordination to meet the requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure choose the most appropriate category from any one of the following:
controls.control_description:
6.1 Reporting of Incidents of Fraud to Reserve Bank of India (RBI)
To ensure uniformity and consistency while reporting incidents of fraud to RBI through
Fraud Monitoring Returns (FMRs) using online portal, Applicable NBFCs shall choose
the most appropriate category from any one of the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to choose the most appropriate category from any one of the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure report incidents of fraud to nhb in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nhb
controls.control_description: They shall report incidents of fraud to NHB in the manner and in Returns / Formats as prescribed by NHB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report incidents of fraud to nhb in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nhb

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish fmr27 in individual fraud cases, irrespective of the amount involved, immediately but not later than 14 days from the date of classification28
controls.control_description:
6.2.1 Applicable NBFCs shall furnish FMR27 in individual fraud cases,
irrespective of the amount involved, immediately but not later than 14 days from
the date of classification28 of an incident / account as fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish fmr27 in individual fraud cases, irrespective of the amount involved, immediately but not later than 14 days from the date of classification28

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reported to the concerned overseas leas in accordance with the relevant laws / regulations of the host countries
controls.control_description:
6.2.2 Incidents of fraud at overseas branches of Indian NBFCs shall also be
reported to the concerned overseas LEAs in accordance with the relevant laws
/ regulations of the host countries.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reported to the concerned overseas leas in accordance with the relevant laws / regulations of the host countries

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report frauds perpetrated in their group entities29 to rbi separately30
controls.control_description:
6.2.3 Applicable NBFCs shall also report frauds perpetrated in their group
entities29 to RBI separately30, if such entities are not regulated / supervised by
any financial sector regulatory / supervisory authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report frauds perpetrated in their group entities29 to rbi separately30

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report incidents of fraud to rbi
controls.control_description:
However, in case of
overseas financial group entity of Indian NBFC, the parent NBFC shall also
report incidents of fraud to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report incidents of fraud to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the timeframe prescribed in these master directions for reporting of fraud cases to rbi32
controls.control_description:
6.2.4 Applicable NBFCs shall adhere to the timeframe prescribed in these
Master Directions for reporting of fraud cases to RBI32.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the timeframe prescribed in these master directions for reporting of fraud cases to rbi32

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided through fmr update application (fua)
controls.control_description:
Applicable NBFCs must
27 Updates to the FMR shall be provided through FMR Update Application (FUA).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided through fmr update application (fua)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be furnished through e-mail (fmgconbfc@rbi
controls.control_description: 30 However, the FMR shall be furnished through e-mail (fmgconbfc@rbi.org.in) only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be furnished through e-mail (fmgconbfc@rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that persons / entities who / which are not involved / associated with the fraud are not reported in the fmr
controls.control_description:
6.2.5 While reporting frauds, Applicable NBFCs shall ensure that persons /
entities who / which are not involved / associated with the fraud are not reported
in the FMR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that persons / entities who / which are not involved / associated with the fraud are not reported in the fmr

controls.control_objective: To ensure , under exceptional circumstances, withdraw fmr / remove name(s) of perpetrator(s) from fmr
controls.control_description:
6.2.6 Applicable NBFCs may, under exceptional circumstances, withdraw FMR
/ remove name(s) of perpetrator(s) from FMR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , under exceptional circumstances, withdraw fmr / remove name(s) of perpetrator(s) from fmr

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, be made with due justification and with the approval of an official at least in the rank of a director
controls.control_description:
Such withdrawal / removal shall,
however, be made with due justification and with the approval of an official at
least in the rank of a director.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, be made with due justification and with the approval of an official at least in the rank of a director

controls.control_objective: To ensure close fraud cases using 'closure module' where the actions as stated below are complete:
controls.control_description:
6.3.1 Applicable NBFCs shall close fraud cases using 'Closure Module' where
the actions as stated below are complete:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to close fraud cases using 'closure module' where the actions as stated below are complete:

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain details of such cases for examination by auditors
controls.control_description:
6.3.3 In all closure cases of reported frauds, Applicable NBFCs shall maintain
details of such cases for examination by auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain details of such cases for examination by auditors

controls.control_objective: To ensure subject the title deeds and other related title documents in respect of all credit facilities of ₹1 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re- ve
controls.control_description:
7.1 Legal Audit of Title Documents in respect of Large Value Loan Accounts
Applicable NBFCs shall subject the title deeds and other related title documents in
respect of all credit facilities of ₹1 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re-
verification, till the loan is fully repaid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to subject the title deeds and other related title documents in respect of all credit facilities of ₹1 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re- ve

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the board approved policy referred to in clause 2
controls.control_description:
The scope and periodicity of legal audit shall be
in accordance with the Board approved policy referred to in clause 2.1 above.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be in accordance with the board approved policy referred to in clause 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure complete the investigation from fraud angle before transferring the loan account / credit facility to other lenders / arcs
controls.control_description:
7.2 Treatment of Accounts classified as Fraud and sold to other Lenders / Asset Reconstruction Companies (ARCs)33
Applicable NBFCs shall complete the investigation from fraud angle before transferring
the loan account / credit facility to other lenders / ARCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to complete the investigation from fraud angle before transferring the loan account / credit facility to other lenders / arcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure report it to rbi / nhb34 before selling the accounts to other lenders / arcs35
controls.control_description:
In cases where Applicable
NBFCs conclude that a fraud has been perpetrated in the account, they shall report it
to RBI / NHB34 before selling the accounts to other lenders / ARCs35.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report it to rbi / nhb34 before selling the accounts to other lenders / arcs35

controls.control_objective: To ensure come across instances where the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility of fraudulent transactions in the account
controls.control_description:
7.3.1 During the course of the audit, auditors may come across instances
where the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility
of fraudulent transactions in the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come across instances where the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility of fraudulent transactions in the account

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately bring it to the notice of the senior management and if necessary, to the audit committee of the board (acb) of the applicable nbfcs for ap
controls.control_description:
In such a situation, the auditor should
immediately bring it to the notice of the senior management and if necessary, to
the Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) of the Applicable NBFCs for
appropriate action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately bring it to the notice of the senior management and if necessary, to the audit committee of the board (acb) of the applicable nbfcs for ap

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover controls and processes involved in prevention, detection, classification, monitoring, reporting, closure and withdrawal of fraud cases, and also
controls.control_description:
7.3.2 Internal Audit in Applicable NBFCs shall cover controls and processes
involved in prevention, detection, classification, monitoring, reporting, closure
and withdrawal of fraud cases, and also weaknesses observed in the critical
processes in the fraud risk management framework of the Applicable NBFC36.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover controls and processes involved in prevention, detection, classification, monitoring, reporting, closure and withdrawal of fraud cases, and also

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to report subsequent developments in such accounts to rbi / nhb, by obtaining requisite information periodically from the concerned arcs
controls.control_description: 35 In cases where accounts are sold to ARCs, Applicable NBFCs shall continue to report subsequent developments in such accounts to RBI / NHB, by obtaining requisite information periodically from the concerned ARCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to continue to report subsequent developments in such accounts to rbi / nhb, by obtaining requisite information periodically from the concerned arcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, and not the date of approval by the competent authority of the applicable nbfc
controls.control_description:
may be, and not the date of approval by the competent authority of the
Applicable NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, and not the date of approval by the competent authority of the applicable nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure report38 instances of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery (including attempted cases), to fraud monitoring group (fmg), department of supervision, ce
controls.control_description:
8.1 Applicable NBFCs shall report38 instances of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery
(including attempted cases), to Fraud Monitoring Group (FMG), Department of
Supervision, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India, immediately (not later than seven
days) from their occurrence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to report38 instances of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery (including attempted cases), to fraud monitoring group (fmg), department of supervision, ce

controls.control_objective: To ensure also submit a quarterly return (rbr) on theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to rbi using online portal, covering all such cases during the quarter
controls.control_description:
8.2 Applicable NBFCs shall also submit a quarterly Return (RBR) on theft, burglary,
dacoity and robbery to RBI using online portal, covering all such cases during the
quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also submit a quarterly return (rbr) on theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to rbi using online portal, covering all such cases during the quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted within 15 days from the end of the quarter to which it relates
controls.control_description:
This shall be submitted within 15 days from the end of the quarter to which it
relates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted within 15 days from the end of the quarter to which it relates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as given under these directions
controls.control_description:
All the
instructions / guidelines contained in these Circulars shall be deemed as given under
these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as given under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure report incidents of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to nhb in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nhb
controls.control_description: They shall report incidents of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to NHB in the manner and in Returns / Formats as prescribed by NHB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report incidents of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to nhb in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nhb
